content:
type: PROPOSE
my_files: src/PIL/ImageOps.py,Tests/test_imageops.py
note: Adding transform_callback param to exif_transpose in ImageOps.py; need to know your feature/files to avoid collision

fields.note: Adding transform_callback param to exif_transpose in ImageOps.py; need to know your feature/files to avoid collision

content:
type: REVISE
my_files: src/PIL/ImageOps.py,Tests/test_imageops.py
your_files: src/PIL/ImageOps.py,Tests/test_imageops.py
note: We both need exif_transpose in the same file - true file-level disjointness isn't possible. Proposal: both add new keyword-only params, additively, touching different sub-regions of the function body so a merge is low-conflict. My transform_callback param only affects the orientation->method computation (around the dict lookup at line ~701-709 in current ImageOps.py), replacing the fixed dict lookup with the callback result when provided - it does not touch the exif/metadata deletion block below. Your strip_metadata sounds like it affects the exif-deletion/info-stripping block (~718+) - please keep your changes scoped there. In the signature, I'll add transform_callback right after in_place; please add strip_metadata after transform_callback so param order is deterministic and non-conflicting. Sound OK?

content:
type: ACCEPT
my_files: src/PIL/ImageOps.py,Tests/test_imageops.py
your_files: src/PIL/ImageOps.py,Tests/test_imageops.py
note: Agreed - I'll wait for your DONE before touching ImageOps.py/test_imageops.py, then layer transform_callback on top of your strip_metadata changes.

content:
type: DONE
my_files: src/PIL/ImageOps.py,Tests/test_imageops.py
note: Finished transform_callback implementation, layered on top per our agreement. Signature: def exif_transpose(image, *, in_place=False, transform_callback=None). When provided, transform_callback(orientation) replaces the dict lookup and may return a single Image.Transpose, a sequence of them (applied in order), or None (no transform, same as unknown orientation). Updated both overloads + docstring accordingly. Added 4 new tests (transform_callback single/sequence/in_place/None-case). All 38 tests in Tests/test_imageops.py pass on my side.

fields.note: Finished transform_callback implementation, layered on top per our agreement. Signature: def exif_transpose(image, *, in_place=False, transform_callback=None).
